# Chapter 10: Electromagnetic waves and antennas  (~100 pp)
- 10.1 Wave equation from Maxwell (15) · 10.2 Plane waves, polarisation (12) · 10.3 Reflection, refraction (12) · 10.4 Transmission lines (15) · 10.5 Waveguides (12) · 10.6 Antennas: dipole, loop, array introduced (15) · 10.7 Failure section: impedance mismatch, standing waves, RF heating (19)

**Archetype**: transport, interface. **Project**: build a simple dipole antenna at 433 MHz; measure SWR. **Exercises**: 30.
